title: picea abies var. chlorocarpa
intro: Picea abies var. chlorocarpa, also known as the green-cone Norway spruce, is a variant of the Norway spruce tree (Picea abies) characterized by its unique green cones. The green cones of this plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including inflammation and respiratory issues, due to their high content of alpha-pinene and other terpenes, which possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Picea abies var. chlorocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory problems, and even exhibit antiviral activity. In herbal preparations, the green cones of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
